description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a mix of white and dark panels, with large glass windows and blue-tinted balcony railings. The front facade includes a prominent entryway with a paved walkway, flanked by landscaped greenery and a driveway leading to the street. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a lawn and a patio area, while the upper floor has balconies overlooking both the front and back. The house is surrounded by low hedges and has a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic. The overall structure emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, and a mix of white and dark exterior panels, featuring balconies and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the rear, highlighting the backyard lawn, patio, and upper balcony with blue railings.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade, showcasing the main entryway, paved walkway, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the side, revealing the driveway, hedges, and the layered structure of the building.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the back and side, emphasizing the large windows, rear balcony, and the open backyard area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide door, paved walkway, and flanked by landscaped hedges
